entry.title: Add a second static PDF document to Customer Statement Correspondence
entry.content:
Hey Experts!

I have a scenario whereby we will be sending out Customer Statements (SAP13) via a Scheduled AR Job, and along with the Statement Form Template we want to attach a second static PDF document with information (i.e. how to read your statement, how to make payment, etc).

I assume that this is actioned via Output Parameter Determination, but cant figure out how to reference the PDF as is in our SAP environment (for example if loaded into Document Management) and then reference it in either the Form Template or Email Settings section of the Output Management.

I had the thought of building a custom Form Template and rebuilding the PDF Document from scratch, then referencing this as Line 2 in the Form Template step, however I feel I am missing something. I have searched Help and Community, but I am unable to find what I am looking for - I know sometimes also if I am not using the right keywords this doesn't help!

Thanks for any guidance you can provide 😊

entry.title: Re: Registration Connector - migrating registrations of P...
entry.content: @qaimoham, a sample test can be run in preview. Two things to be considered before starting the test: The class has the "User Can Waitlist" enabled and the notifications are on - their triggers are available here.

entry.title: Re: Download + License of SQL Anywhere on Linux
entry.content:
You can download Linux Patches from the same location as where you obtain your Windows patches.  See the following 2297839 - How to download a patch for SAP SQL Anywhere for a more detailed instructions.

SQL Anywhere patches on v12.0.1 and later can be used to perform an initial install or to update an existing install.  Additionally, the install defaults to the Developer Edition if you do not provide a registration (license) key.

entry.title: Re: Problemas al actualizar orden usando B1S-ReplaceColle...
entry.content:
Estimados les comparto le que he estado analizando para poder darle una solución a este problema presentado.

He identificado dos posibles formas de realizar los cambios en la actualización de órdenes de venta :

  1. Modificar el valor del "UnitPrice" agregándole 0.0001. Dado que nuestra facturación se redondea a dos decimales, este ajuste no afecta los montos finales. Sin embargo, en pedidos de gran volumen, los valores podrían variar ligeramente.

  2. Realizar un segundo envío y descartar el primero. En este caso, el primer envío generaría el error, pero el segundo lo corregiría. No obstante, esta solución implicaría un mayor tiempo de respuesta para reflejar los cambios en SAP.

Espero que esta información les sea útil. Quedo atento a sus comentarios.

entry.title: Issue with individual status of an object: airq for maintenance orders by phases
entry.content:
Hi eveyone. I need Help please!!!

Context: Im from latam and on my own languaje i have problems in the customizing: Configure Overall Status Profiles.

It results in Spanish exist an individual status named: (IANe = Info adicional necesaria). His equal in english is: (AIRQ = Additional Info Required). The problem ocurrs when i put the IANe and push Enter the status put it selves empty and dosent exist another status in the sistem that can work

PD: in 050 this part of the configuration its all ready in english and spanish but when i get out of the point of configuration in spanish it calls a error. I just pull x.

The image of upside is when i gonna configurate in spanish and i use the macth code

upside i chose status IANe and and I haven't hit enter yet.

upside i press enter and it clears it selves.

upside same point of the customize in the best practice server 050 when i put the system in spanish.

upside same point of the customizing in english 050

entry.title: Compensation – EC Entry Level Field Labels Not Visible
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I am facing an issue while mapping some fields in a Compensation template. I am trying to map a field that is in the Job Information portlet specific to Germany (Job Info_DEU). The data for this field comes from a picklist. However, when mapping this field to display the label, I am unable to show it, even though the employee has this field filled in their profile and we can see the label.

I have tested mapping the field using all three available options:

  1. Job Information (DEU) Contract Type -> Displays the Option ID of the picklist.

  2. Job Information (DEU) Contract Type.Code -> Displays the code.

  3. Job Information (DEU) Contract Type.Label -> Displays the Option ID of the picklist

     

None of these mapping options retrieve the label of the field correctly. Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: can not see add button in List report
entry.content:
thank you!!

enabling draft made it visible

@odata.draft.enabled

 

 

thanks for the response, but I still do not find it

I even tried forcing these values, I can hide the delete button but I cannot make the insert button to appear.
 
using MedicalCareService as service from '../../srv/service';
annotate service.DoctorSet with @(

    Capabilities.InsertRestrictions :{
        Insertable: true,
    },

    Capabilities.UpdateRestrictions :{
        Updatable: true,
    },

     Capabilities.DeleteRestrictions :{
        Deletable: true,
    },
);

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@marcelo_santosbueno2 

BW PCE data product generator is to push your data from the info provider into the data store object of Datasphere, there is no automatic migration. BDC then consumes your BW InfoProviders through a Data Product created in the Datasphere.

You can also import SAP BW objects (including queries) and their dependencies, through the BW/4HANA Model Transfer via Semantic Onboarding, without requiring extensive migration work. When onboarding to SAP Datasphere, this import automatically generates new entities based on SAP BW/4HANA objects and captures the associated semantics. This method allows for the migration of specific SAP BW assets to SAP Datasphere, replacing existing data flows.

happy learning, Jeet

entry.title: Reactive maintenance order w.r.t notification error (Work center does not exist)
entry.content: I am using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. I have been trying to create reactive maintenance order w.r.t notification in the create maintenance order app. Notification has been accepted. When I try to create the order system gives an unusal error "work center does not exist in plant". I am not sure why system is not allowing me to proceed. If I go to change maintenance notification app and create an order from that screen system is allowing me to proceed and my order for reactive maintenance is created without any objection. This did not occur always but it has been happening for the past few days. Based on my understanding, only pre-requisite for reactive maintenance is that the maintenance request should include a priority and it should be accepted. Both of these steps are done but system does not allow creating order from create maintenance order app.

entry.title: Re: SAP Functional Consultant (Various Opportunities)
entry.content: Am interested

entry.title: Onboarding process is stuck in BPE after the second rehire verification
entry.content:
Hello,

We are observing the issue that Onboarding process is stuck by the error in BPE when onboarding rehire verification is done and rehire with new employment is chosen. This is only related to the following scenario:
1) Onboarding process is cancelled,
2) Onboarding process is re-initiated with different e-mail ID,
3) Review New Hire Data and Personal Data Collection is completed,
4) Second Rehire Verification is triggered,
5) Cancelled onboardee profile is selected and rehire with new employment is chosen,
6) Then process is stuck in BPE - no error log in To-Do BPE tile.

Does anyone know what could be the root cause?

 

Thank you for any tips.

BR,

Lukasz

entry.title: Re: Cache cleanup in SAP BTP HTML5 Applications
entry.content: Same question as @vbalko-claimate !

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@SreekanthSurampally Thank you for the questions.

SAP managed data products will be persisted in Data lake files (SPARK + HDLF) and provided via the Foundation Services (FOS) layer in SAP BDC - using Open Resource Discovery(ORD) and Delta Share/Zero-copy.

While customer-managed data products/BW data products will be persisted in Data lake files (SPARK + HDLF) and provided via SAP Datasphere embedded object store.

Hope this helps, Jeet

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@CP_PL SAP Signavio helps customers improve processes, ultimately helping organizations achieve operational excellence and agility.

While SAP BDC is a stop for BI, AI, and planning. All data and analytics needs.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP’s Product Strategy for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Solutions
entry.content: @BNguyen Thank you for attending the SAP GRC 2026 Roadmap session! We apologize for any inconvenience. We will reach out to SAPInsider to check when they’ll be publishing the slide decks.

entry.title: Re: can not see add button in List report

thank you!

made draft visible solved the problem

@odata.draft.enabled

entry.title: Re: How to Transfer Physical Sample Information from 05 t...
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

MM01/MM02

 

Activate inspection type 09 at the time of material creation. AND enter the number of days in the field "Inspection interval" in QM view.

 

This field indicates at what frequency in days you need to trigger the recurring inspection lot.

 

QA05

 

Define a variant for recurring inspection lot generation. Refer the below pasted link for the same.

 

[Related Thread|;

 

It will trigger the inspection lots according to the date of next inspection date in he Batch.

 

QP01

 

You need to keep a inspection plan ready to record results for this lot.

 

QA32

 

Record Results for the inspection lot.

 

Perform UD for the lot.

 

update us to help you more, reward points to help you better!

 

Regards,

Saquib hussain

entry.title: Re: Double-sided printing
entry.content: This only works if printing to your local printer and not printing from a server in SPAD

My SAP customer wonders whether the system can have a warning message when the material target stock exceeds the maximum stock level while manually creating a purchase order.

The system version is S/4 Hana on Public Cloud 2502.

Could anyone give helpful information here?

Thanks a lot.

Steven

entry.content: @Cocquerel this article may be helpful in answering your question: SAP Cloud ALM Document Integration with Google Docs / Share Point.  We are about to start setting the integration up so I can't comment yet as to if this works with Google docs, but thought you might like to see the article.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA Manage WFA Permission Artifacts Sync Job
entry.content: Hi @abalasescu2 - sorry no idea. Do you have analysis options that use free text as ID? It could have the same issue like Location, i.e. duplicate ID with different upper/lower case.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA missing metrics
entry.content: Hi @abalasescu2 - there is no change as far as I know.  Termination Tenure <30/90 days is using Employment Level or FLSA dimension (i.e. Exempt / Non-Exempt) as filter.  If the instance does not have this standard dimension setup, the measure will not show up.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA missing metrics
entry.content: @abalasescu@ - can you provide example DC and instance ID to check?

entry.title: Re: Custom Code Migration (BTP): Object Navigation missing
entry.content: Dear Cusotmer, I have added the appropriate tag "SAP BTP, ABAP Environment" & "SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment" for BTP issues. This will help attract more attention from my colleagues to the question. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Hello everyone, question, do you know if it is possible to create an LSMW to load release strate
entry.content: Dear Customer, The current tag "Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager" seems not the correct one. To attract more attention from my colleagues to the question, please share the system type and other details about the question. Is the system ERP? Some questions about the LSMW are with tag "MM (Materials Management)", do you think it is related? Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: ABAP new syntax 7.5+ - REDUCE with COND operator
entry.content:
Funny how we still call this "new" syntax even though it must be around 10 years old now. 🙂

There is a good old post on this subject: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/a-real-case-to-use-reduce-to-finish-a-task-in-daily-work/ba-p/13321232

On that post, there is a comment from Suhas Saha with the same example as in this post but the naming and use of SWITCH I think looks a bit better.

There is also this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/replace-the-loop-for-reduce-operator/ba-p/13337810

And if someone has access to CDS views, such examples can probably be better handled at that level. To be honest, I'm yet to use REDUCE in real life. It seems like a rather niche command and is not well readable IMHO.

entry.title: Hello everyone, question, do you know if it is possible to create an LSMW to load release strategies
Re: Search Help Exit Call Control Steps In ABAP
entry.content:
This year brought many surprises but to be honest, reading about search help user exits is the last thing I expected. 🙂 

If this post on the subject was a person, it would be able to drink legally in some countries: https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/controlling-manipulating-data-of-search-help-using-search-help-exit/ba-p/12889691

The code examples are old-fashioned and poorly formatted, sorry to say. Please do read Clean ABAP and try to learn what commands have become obsolete in ABAP. Here is also a good cheat sheet for Modern ABAP: https://www.brandeis.de/en/blog/cheat-sheet-modern-abap-en

Cheers.

entry.title: S/4 Hana, how to add customer/vendor field when running foreign currency valuation
S/4 Hana, how to add customer/vendor field in items when running foreign currency valuation
Re: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SA...
entry.content: Dear Srinivas, The system key in the LMDB is "SID + DBHostname + Installation number". I need to understand what changes have been made after the DB and platform migration to help you further. The "Move" function mentioned in 1727294 & 1694004 are valid when both the DB Hostname and Installation Number change. You can refer to the "Case 2 (AS ABAP only): The entries have different installation numbers. Additionally, the host names may also differ." in Note 1694004 for more details. Here are the steps you need to follow when moving the system in the SLD: 1. Follow exactly steps in Note 1694004, and change both "Installation Number" and "System Home" to the new. 2. Save the changes and wait for the SAP_LMDB_LDB* job to finish. I have confirmed with the Charm team, as long as the system GUID remains the same, Charm will not be affected. The steps to check GUID: t-code LMDB->Display ABAP system->click on button "Details"->Qualifiers->SAP_GUID. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: SSAM 2405 with Dynamic forms - Forms are not loading
entry.content:
Hi Pramila,

I'm experiencing the same issue as you described. Were you able to find a solution?

EDIT: After reading your post again, my issue might be different. My forms are downloaded in SSAM and I can see them in the Form section of WO, but when I open them, it is just showing a blank page. Only the buttons and page title are visible.

Thanks,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: Portfolio Management – Enhanced Financial Planning integration
entry.content:
Hi Andrea,

If my business is adopting Plan Categories instead of Plan Versions, do they still have to use CJ46 and CJ47 for OH Calculation. Is there any tile to do the same calculation on Plan Categories.

If no, then what will make the Data flow to CO Tables in case of  using Plan Categories?

Is it that temporary Program (S4 to ECC) to Transfer Cost from ACDOCP to S4 and that also till when will this program be supported by SAP? Wonder why no S4 Equivalent of CJ46 for Categories.

 

Thanks and Regards

Rajeev

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: OData Connector for PowerBi
entry.content:
Hi @shelendra.

In my case, the issue occurred after switching the connection from Tenant A to Tenant B. Since the connector is a custom connector, it seems that the credentials were not properly reset during the process of changing the connection information, causing an issue with Power BI's cache.

To resolve it, I manually deleted the .index and .dat files located in the following cache folder:

C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Power BI Desktop\Cache

The path to your cache folder may differ from mine, and since I wasn’t sure which file contained the Datasphere credentials, I deleted all .index and .dat files in that folder and tried again.

Just in case, I recommend backing up the files before deleting them.
After that, I restarted Power BI and everything worked as expected.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Table Control

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2024年04月 – 2024年06月）
entry.content: Thanks a lot .

entry.title: Customer->BP Synchronization Error(CVI)
entry.content:
I am doing ECC to S/4HANA Conversion.

I ran customer synchronization(T-code 'CVI_COCKPIT' > 'CVI load' Tab > Load Tool), some of which caused errors.

The error message is as follows.

Message no. AM328 'You cannot create a comment with serial number 000'

When I analyzed it, when KNA1-KUNNR = BUT020-PARTNER, it could be KNA1-ADRNR ≠ BUT020-ADDRNUMBER.

However, when looking up KNA1-ADRNR and BUT020-ADDRNUMBER in the ADRC table, the values of the two data must match, and the error seems to occur if the two data are inconsistent.

If you know how to make the error disappear when I perform Customer->BP Synchronization, please share it.

I don't want a way to modify the data one by one.

Thank you.

entry.title: In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,can the field ' batch' set as mandatory
entry.content:
In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,can the  field  ' batch'    (Goods Recept) be set as mandatory?

 

Title:Production Order Create: Header 

 

Component:PP-SFC

 

Technical Component ID  CO01

 

Framework ID  GUIScreenSAPLCOKO1     

 

System:X9A

entry.title: How to deal with the SI Checks results
entry.content:
How to deal with the SI Checks results


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to deal with the SI Checks results
entry.content:
Please note that only in this situation->RED status in "Last Consistency", you need handle it with the relevant note.
If have problems, you can create a case under the relevant component.

Refer SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check - How to do it right. 

If the Yellow status shows in "Last Consistency", you can just read the below and ignore.

  • These you should be aware of and read the corresponding SAP note, but they are no show stoppers for the system conversion/upgrade. Therefore no mandatory action is required to solve these before the conversion. Though there might be activities required after the conversion, or activities where you can decide whether you do them before or after the conversion.

If the Grey status in "Last Consistency", it means not acceptable, please just ignore and no need take any action.

If the Yellow status in "Exemption you can refer "Red error messages (return code 7)" part in https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-simplification-it...

entry.title: Re: #CoE#LAL Customize search criteria in Create Golden T...
entry.content:
Hi customer,

Good Day!

Yes, you can customize the Search Criteria by using the BAdI 

IDGTCN_OB_GEN_UI_SEARCH_META - China: Determination of UI Search Metadata

IDGTCN_OB_GEN_UI_SEARCH_DYM - China: Configuration of Dynamic UI Search

 

Hope the information could help you.

 

Best regards,

Lola

entry.title: Re: Functional area derived from cost center category?
entry.content:
Dear,

The field functional area is also available in Fiori app Manage Cost Centers.

so the field exists for both migration template and Fiori app is that it offers more flexibility for functional areas derivation.

Functional areas can be derived:

1. from G/L Accounts, 

2.Manual input from Post General Journal Entries

3. Cost Center Master data

4.Cost Center Categories.

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...
entry.content: can you share what you did under "APIs" under settings?

entry.title: Re: Which Currency Should Be Used for Uploading Cost and...
entry.content:
Dear,

you can add more fields and currency types in the excel template downloaded from Import Financial Plan Data, as mentioned in the previous post. so you can add transaction currency and company code currency etc.

in Maintain Category for Planning configuration, Exchange Rate Type is can maintained.

To "ensure consistency in financial reporting and project tracking across multiple currencies" , the setting should be tied back to Define Currency Settings for Ledgers and Company Codes configuration

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can you tell me with YES/No answer whether in this SAP Docker Container instance (sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01) will it be possible to install Add-on OpenText DS,CS or/and AC instances ?

Thanks

Kushal_Sambhunath_Banerjee

entry.title: 回复： quality inspection process return the goods to the su...
entry.content:
您好，

放入冻结库存和退回供应商是2种不同的质检决定，应该在做适用决策的时候直接用代码区分，而不是先放入冻结库存然后再退回供应商。

在公有云系统中，如果您已经做了错误的质检把物料放入了冻结库存，可以通过新建一个检验批把物料放回质检库存，然后重新做决策。请参考下面的文章：
SAP Note  2695182 - Reversal of goods movements after usage decision

SAP Support
Matt

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content:
Hi @roberto4s

Really appreciate for your help and thanks for your support. But I couldn't get the correct value till now. I have shown the step by step screenshot of each component. Could you pls advise which is not the correct one? And also could you provide your steps in details?

entry.title: Re: Functional Currency differs from Company Code Currency
entry.content:
Dear

Using free define currency as a functional currency is very inconvenient.

unfortunately, S/4HANA Cloud does not allow to change company code currency, as it always the same as the official currency in which the country  it belongs.

However, in practice, some customers for example, HK companies require USD company code currency(functional currency) rather than HKD, they just created HK company codes under US country version.

The same may not be true in your scenario, but this approach may be worth considering and testing.

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...
entry.content: @Charlie_Lin, check this https://johnytips-sap.blogspot.com/

entry.title: Configuration For Allowing Price Change in Service Entry Sheet
entry.content:
Hi, I am new in SAP. I am trying to change the service entry setting to allow for price changes.

1. Change in SPRO

SPRO > MM Materials Management > External Services Management > Define Screen Layout > Purchase Order > Price and Value Fields > Price chgble at service entry as an optional entry.

2. PO Creation

Create PO > Service Tab > Table Settings (table icon) > Administrator > Edit system settings > untick Price Change Allowed.

I am stuck here. I have saved all steps, but the column still does not appear in the service tab. When I try again, step by step, the changes are not saved.  I tried many times to save, but the result is still the same.

Anyone can help me?

Ignacio.

entry.title: Re: Web IDE Service Catalog
entry.content: This is the problem no drop down menu in service catalog

entry.title: Re: Stay certified - Is an SAP Learning Hub subscription...
entry.content: Hi, I just got my certification updated with my newly paid Learning Hub purchase, and it is VERY confusing and web pages are still inconsistently showing my status as either not certified, pending, or up to date, depending on which I go to. And this is unnerving with the upcoming expiration next week, because they also say I "still need to certify before too late!". But then if I use the right browser and reset cache enough times, usually MS Edge, it will show as up to date. I put in a case id Case ID 5000129447 and it did not help. I also lost 2 months of Learning Hub access because it took this much time to sort it out and I could not use in the meantime. I had asked someone to call me on the case, or get some assistance. I have been certifying since the 90s in SAP, and it is currently much more difficult than it ever was.

entry.title: Re: How to Call Web Service BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkRepli...

entry.title: Re: SAP GROW embeded TM - multi pick and multi drop scena...
entry.content:
Hi,

Transportation Management considers Incoterms during transportation planning for the purposes of stage building. TM uses Incoterm Location 1 to build freight unit stages. Kindly explore this option of Incoterm and Incoterm locations and check if you can model your scenario. 

Incoterms and Incoterm Locations | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Saurabh Goyal

entry.title: Re: SAP GROW embeded TM - multi pick and multi drop scena...
entry.content:
Hi,

Transportation Management considers Incoterms during transportation planning for the purposes of stage building. TM uses Incoterm location 1 to build freight unit stages. Kindly check this option of Incoterm and Incoterm location to model your scenario and evaluate the requirement.

Incoterms and Incoterm Locations | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Saurabh Goyal

entry.title: Re: Controller file for custom section to an object page using extensions
entry.content: please share more details how you solved it? I have a similar requirement of adding custom section in object page of PO item and then display table in that section. Can you please guide me?

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Commitments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, I have made all the required configuration and uploaded the cost center budget. while posting the accounting document with more than the available budget system giving the Error message correctly but while creating the Purchase order with cost center and GL account system giving the Error message and also not updating in the commitment. 

Available control activated in the cost enter level but still commitments functionality not working.  can some once help me.

 

Best Regards,
Sreehari.

entry.title: Re: Reactive maintenance order w.r.t notification error (Work center does not exist)
entry.content: In the "Create Maintenance Order App", check what work center you have input on the header data, also go to the operations tab to check the work center there. Work Centers are a configurable field with a standard set of drop down values (assigned to maintenance plants), so if you have tried to manually type one in and made a spelling mistake, then the maintenance order won't save successfully.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Fiori App F6991 – Project Cost O...
entry.content: Hi Ken, I've gone through numerous blogs and SAP Notes, but none of them seem to address my specific issue. Despite extensive research, I haven't found any mention of this problem, leaving me without a clear solution. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Report amount of employees access internal career por...
entry.content: Hi Sanjeet! Thank you for your comment!

entry.title: Encountering issues while activating the BP data model
entry.content:
Hi There,

While activating the BP data model, I encountered an error stating, "Field symbol has not been assigned yet." I added a custom entity to the BP model while the BP data model activation was in display mode. I deleted the custom entity and attempted to activate the model again, but the error is not resolved. I also removed locks for all users to check for any locked objects, but the error remains unresolved.

Details of the error:

  • Runtime error: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
  • ABAP Program: CL_USMD_MDF_MODEL_GENERATOR===CP    

 

 Kind regards,

 Meghana.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Asset Management – Output Management using Work Packs
entry.content:
Hello Sir,

This is a Wonderful & Informative blog! However, for you, there are attachments available for Printing Job Cards, but for my Case, Attachments are 0, even though I have an attachment added in the Work Order Documents tab. This attachment is Visible for the Email Option. Would you be able to help with this, as in what is missing & needs to be done to automatically include the Attachments attached in the Work Order Documents tab, in the Job Card for Printing?

 

Thanks & Regards,
Tulika

entry.title: Re: Document Generation - A complete Guide Including Troubleshoot
entry.content:
Thank you for the detailed information.

Do we have any predefined templates in Document Generation Templates?

Ex : Offer letter format. Experience letter.

Kindly advice.

entry.title: Re: ASE 16 failed to start post Linux SUSE patch upgrade...
entry.content: Hi, is your ASE version 16.0 SP03? This looks like the known issue described in: https://me.sap.com/notes/3581984 You can revert the OS files to previous version(GLIBC version < 2.36) to start ASE. Then update the ASE to ASE16SP04PL06 or higher per Note 3425215.

entry.title: Re: Integrating Netweaver ≤7.4 Systems with SAP Forms Service by Adobe on Cloud Foundry
entry.content: Nice Information. But what is the license cost from on-Prem ADS on Nw Java vs BTP ADS services also in BTP it's based on several PDFs., can you elaborate more on what is Risk?

entry.title: Unable to activate BP data model after creating an entity
entry.content: I am unable to activate BP data model after creating an entity . While activating the entity it is showing the error as "Field symbol is not assigned yet ". Later on I deleted the created entity and tried to activate it again it showed the same error so I debugged the code , but still the deleted entity is being read into the internal table. How can this be solved?

entry.title: Re: Project Budget Approval
entry.content:
Added Finance tag and removed other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...
entry.content: I am running into an error "We are sending you a release email on your registered mail ID/s. Error in sending the notification" in the last step of API Management Service Set Up In Progress

entry.title: Re: In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,ca...
entry.content:
Hello,

you cannot make the field mandatory via configuration.
You could use the Prod. Sched. Profile to activate the automatic creation of the batch. With this setting you can still put in a batch number manually but if the user does not do it, the system will do it based on the two possibilities.

Regards
Johannes

entry.title: Work Item Level Execution in DTV
entry.content:
Problem Statement

If you are already using DTV tool for business data validation, you may already know that DTV generates work items as per the split parameters provided in the test specifications.

Customers may sometimes get to a scenario where they wish to.

  • Execute individual or set of work items of their choice
  • Execute failed/ cancelled work items only

To address such requirements DTV tool introduces work item level execution in the new release DTV 1.6.

Work Items

With DTV 1.6 release onwards, the tool is introduced with new concept called work item level execution. For each Extraction/Simulation, the tool generates work items explicitly first and then the work item level execution happens for respective work items. In this way DTV facilitates smaller data extraction as well as if extraction for one or more work item fails/cancels, you can run the failed/cancelled work items explicitly which makes the overall DTV execution faster.

You can find the Generate Workitems buttons in both Simulation as well as Extraction screens as highlighted below.

Once the work items are generated by using the above button, the execution status changes to

You can see the generated work items in the Result tab.

Project Global Data and Work Items

In DTV project global data is used to split the business data into smaller chunks and the project global data is also applicable to all the reports. But it is worth to mention that the definition of project global data is directly related to number of work items that will be generated during the Extraction / Simulation phase.

In the below example of project global data, only one work item will be created.

However, it is always recommended to further split the project global data to generate multiple work items for smaller and faster simulation/extraction. Below is a simple example of further finetuning of the project global data.

Define Project Global data wisely to split the data into smaller chunks (work items)

You can define the project global data wisely by splitting, which in turn will create multiple work items. E.g. For the below project global data 5 work items will be generated.

Check the work items created in Result tab.

Once work items are generated you can execute the work items with different options as per your requirement

  • Execute all the work items together (by default)
  • You can select multiple work items as per your requirement and execute
  • You can also execute the failed or cancelled work items only

Select multiple work items and run

If you have generated multiple work items and you would like to execute only few, you have the possibility to select the desired work items and execute simulation or extraction.

Select failed work items and run

If there are failed or cancelled work items, you can simply select the failed work item and execute the simulation or extraction.

DTV Useful links

Business data validation using DTV tool

Best practices to follow during DTV implementation

3117879 - Data Transition Validation DTV Tool - Central Note

3569864 - DTV Tool 1.6 Delivery

entry.title: Extending Standard Fiori Apps in Visual Studio Code
entry.content: I am creating custom apps in Visual Studio Code, but I want to know how to handle standard Fiori apps in Visual Studio Code. As you know, in Fiori WebIDE, we can extend standard apps. How can we do the same in Visual Studio Code? Is there an option available to extend them?

entry.title: Re: Project Budget Approval
entry.content:
Hi Ignacio,

Unfortunately, it's not supported.

Please raise feature request.

The link for Influence for finance is  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/1169

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How to perform the Product Update using Odata v4 in sap s4hana Cloud
entry.content: I am trying API_PURCHASEORDER_2 api, by setting if-match=*, but i am getting below error

entry.title: Re: How to perform the Product Update using Odata v4 in sap s4hana Cloud
entry.content: { "error" : { "code" : "RAP_RUNTIME/025", "message" : "Operation is not enabled", "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory" : "Provider_Application_Error", "innererror" : { "ErrorDetails" : { "@SAP__common.Application" : { "ComponentId" : "MM-PUR-PO", "ServiceRepository" : "SRVD_A2X", "ServiceId" : "API_PURCHASEORDER_2", "ServiceVersion" : "0001" }, "@SAP__common.TransactionId" : "00259DEC28330250E0067E1CE3ED8F8D", "@SAP__common.Timestamp" : "20250325051959.444584", "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution" : { "Analysis" : "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details", "Note" : "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)" } } } } }

entry.title: Re: IP30 layout
entry.content: Try IP30H. This transaction is for S/4 HANA and runs deadline monitoring a lot faster than IP30. You will also find there are a lot more fields to choose for variants including Planning Plant.

entry.title: BYD2502 Enable Withholding Tax
entry.content:
Dear SAP staff

We would like to use the withholding tax management function in Japan, but it is not localized.
We found the following blog post, but if we follow the steps in the blog, will it work?
We are asking because we could not find the list of Tax Basic Countries listed in the prerequisites.


Best PERSON_NAME,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2502 Enable Withholding Tax
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

Thank you for your query.

We’d like to clarify that Japan is one of the standard localized countries supported in SAP Business ByDesign. This means that withholding tax management is already available as part of the standard localization for Japan, and you do not need to follow the steps intended for non-localized countries.

The SAP Notes and blog post you referred to are applicable for countries that are not localized, so they are not necessary in your case.

If you are not seeing the relevant withholding tax options in your system, please let us know, and we’ll be happy to assist further.

Kindly have a look into the below SAP KBA: 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2814131

https://me.sap.com/notes/3388229

About Standard Localization 

In this version, SAP supports customers to run business with SAP Business ByDesign according to the international standards and local requirements. We support customers running their business in different countries/regions of the world by providing them with the legal standards and best practices of the country/region.

This includes the following features:

  • Functional Localization: Ensures that the solution enables legal compliance and follows the best practices.

  • Internationalization: Ensures that we support the specific local languages and cultures. Some of the generic features supported are Unicode, Currencies, Time Zones, Calendars, and Script Direction.

  • Translation: Ensures that we translate the SAP Business ByDesign solution into other languages, focusing on the user interface, and the documentation for certain languages.

 Currently SAP provides standard localization for 21 countries as follows:

Australia 
Austria 
Belgium 
Canada 
China 
Denmark 
France 
Germany 
India 
Israel 
Italy 
Japan 
Mexico 
Netherlands 
New Zealand 
South Africa
South Korea
Spain
Switzerland
United Kingdom
USA

Additional Resources : 

Blog: The value, boundaries and approach of pre-localized countries category at SAP Business ByDesign

SAP Business ByDesign help document: Localization

Work zone: Localization Toolkit; Localization_Tax_Basic_Countries/Regions.pdf

Community: SAP Business ByDesign Localization

 

Best Regards

Pooja

entry.title: Re: We need the provision for FB01 & F-48
entry.content: Dear Jeremy,

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: Sorry : it’s level 23

entry.title: EarlyWatch Alertの送信先メールアドレス変更の手順
entry.content:
How to change the e-mail address in EWA configuration page step 5 Maintain Recipients?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EarlyWatch Alertの送信先メールアドレス変更の手順
entry.content:
There are 2 ways to change the e-mail address.
1.update the e-mail address of the current user
2.It is assumed the recipients used have already been maintained in the Global Recipients List. However, you can at this point add new email recipients in the Global Recipients List , and then add them to the Maintain Recipients step. If you would like to add an external user of solman system, you can click Maintain Global Recipients -> External tab -> Add Recipients ->Input name and email then click Add button ->Go back to step 5 Maintain Recipients -> click Add button to finish all the steps -> In case you could not find the user you would like to add, use the filter by clicking ID/Display name in step 3 Assign Recipients.
Refer:2282944 - EarlyWatch Alert: Solution Manager 7.2 How to Setup / Configure EWA Reports or Add Email Recipients

entry.title: Re: SAP TM , restrict number of pickups from plant during...
entry.content:
Hi @mansi_maskeri ,

I think you need to use door as Handling resources and assign to your location for precise use...please see below link and let us know if further questions...

Door in TM as Handling resource:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/e7f099ced720410f9010a3ca429170eb.html?locale=en-US&version=1909.latest

Handling Resorce/Door assign into location: Just example

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: MDK Grid table converting into Object page on iPad Air 11 inch , is this a bug?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have implemented a Grid Table for 3 columns but this gets converted into Object table on my new iPad air 11inch. I understand that Grid table will be converted into Object table for phones however for iPads it should not, right? Am I doing something wrong or is this a bug ? 

Also, Is there a way to change the Ancestor icon on iOS? I want that to be like a deletion button.. Thanks!

Here is the simplest code I tried:

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.GridTable",
                    "Target": {
                        "Service": "/Test/Services/Mobile_Test.service",
                        "EntitySet": "ZC_Test_REFERENCE_SOURCE"
                    },
                    "_Name": "SectionGridTable0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "Row": {
                        "Items": [
                            {
                                "NumberOfLines": 1,
                                "Text": "Item",
                                "TextAlignment": "Left"
                            },
                            {
                                "NumberOfLines": 1,
                                "Text": "Item",
                                "TextAlignment": "Left"
                            },
                            {
                                "NumberOfLines": 1,
                                "Text": "Item",
                                "TextAlignment": "Left"
                            }
                        ],
                        "Layout": {
                            "ColumnWidthPercentage": [
                                0.33,
                                0.33,
                                0.33
                            ]
                        },
                        "AccessoryType": "None"
                    },
                    "DataPaging": {
                        "ShowLoadingIndicator": false,
                        "PageSize": 50
                    }
                }
            ],
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            }
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "test2",
    "ActionBar": {
        "Items": [],
        "_Name": "ActionBar1",
        "_Type": "Control.Type.ActionBar"
    }
}

entry.title: Re: In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,ca...
entry.content: Thank you very much for your answer! I appreciate it, but I still have a question, how to enter this page? Looking forward to your reply

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve single record in cloud functions in sap build apps
entry.content:
Hi Pekka,

Thanks! That is actually the workaround I did. However, I used a data variable to retrieve instead of using the get list function in vcf. I'm having issues with the get list function returning an "unexpected error" and then no other information. Would you know what's causing this and/or where can I go to troubleshoot this some more? Like some logs, stacktrace, etc?

Below are screenshots of a test page I created to demo. Page contains a button, upon click will run the cloud function 'test func' and will show an alert dialog box if success or error. Another screenshot for the implementation of 'test func'.

Opening dev console, this is the response when clicking the button

{
    "status": 200,
    "statusText": "OK",
    "headers": {
        "access-control-allow-origin": "*",
        "allow": "OPTIONS,GET,HEAD,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE",
        "access-control-allow-headers": "content-type, authorization",
        "access-control-allow-methods": "OPTIONS,GET,HEAD,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE",
        "access-control-allow-credentials": "true",
        "strict-transport-security": "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload",
        "content-security-policy": "default-src 'none'",
        "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
        "date": "Tue, 25 Mar 2025 05:40:06 GMT",
        "x-envoy-upstream-service-time": "9",
        "server": "istio-envoy",
        "connection": "close"
    },
    "responseText": "{\"id\":\"7267fe0a-6431-4c2a-85de-f120bab6a8e7\",\"functionId\":\"8424c4b6-96af-4601-84b3-0b2a594e4f8b\",\"inputs\":{},\"startedAt\":\"2025-03-25T05:40:06.849Z\",\"completedAt\":\"2025-03-25T05:40:06.850Z\",\"terminationRequested\":false,\"output\":{\"id\":\"unexpectedError\",\"kind\":\"error\",\"values\":{}}}"
}

entry.title: Re: Joule "not currently enabled for you" when following SAP Build Code Test Drive Mission
entry.content: Hi, I got it working briefly, but when logging on to the SAP Business Application Studio the day after, I had the same issue again, "This feature is currently not enabled for you."

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA: 7 pitfalls that make projects unnecessarily expensive
entry.content: Good summary
